title: DaCaF: Probabilistic multi-label classification via a divide-and-conquer and fusion approach
description:
DaCaF is a Python library for Bayes-optimal inference in probabilistic multi-label classification. It implements probabilistic classifier chains with a divide-and-conquer and fusion approach to make metric-specific predictions (F-measure, Hamming, subset accuracy, precision, recall, NPV, markedness) that are optimal for the target evaluation measure.

This release accompanies the article "Probabilistic multi-label classification via a divide-and-conquer and fusion approach" (Information Fusion, 2026; DOI 10.1016/j.inffus.2026.104517) and includes a CPU-only reproducibility capsule (Docker + scripts/reproduce_capsule.sh) that regenerates the paper's CHD-49 result table in seconds.
